# TruContact Developer Documentation

> Developer documentation for TransUnion TruContact Trusted Call Solutions: Call Authentication (CCID), Spam Tag Mitigation (CNO), Branded Call Display (BCD), and Spoofed Call Protection (SCP). Includes REST API reference, webhooks, analytics, and platform integration guides.

## Core

- [Home](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/): Product overview and entry point
- [Call Authentication (CCID)](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/call-auth): Required prerequisite for SCP and BCD; verifies caller identity
- [Spoofed Call Protection (SCP)](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/scp): Digitally sign outbound calls to prevent number spoofing
- [Branded Call Display (BCD)](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd): Display brand name, logo, and call reason on recipient handsets
- [Spam Tag Mitigation (CNO)](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/cno): Prevent legitimate calls from being mislabeled as spam

## Setup Guides

- [SCP Setup Guide](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/scp/guide)
- [BCD Setup Guide](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/guide)
- [CNO Setup Guide](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/cno/guide)
- [Webhook Setup Guide](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/resources/webhooks/guide): Subscription lifecycle, event reference, and trigger keys

## API Reference

- [Create Auth Token](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/auth-token)
- [Create Account](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/create-account)
- [Get Account](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/get-account)
- [Update Account](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/update-account)
- [Delete Account](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/delete-account)
- [Attach Account TCS](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/attach-account-tcs)
- [Get Account TCS](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/get-account-tcs)
- [Attach Features](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/attach-feature)
- [Get Features](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/get-feature)
- [Get Partner Feature Status](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/get-partner-feature)
- [Delete Features](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/delete-feature)
- [Create Image](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/create-image)
- [Get Image](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/get-image)
- [Delete Image](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/delete-image)
- [Create Image Profile](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/create-image-profile)
- [Get Image Profile](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/get-image-profile)
- [Delete Image Profile](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/delete-image-profile)
- [Attach SCP Caller Profile](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/attach-scp-caller-profile)
- [Attach Rich BCD Caller Profile](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/attach-bcd-caller-profile)
- [Attach CNO Caller Profile](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/attach-cno-caller-profile)
- [Get Caller Profile](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/get-caller-profile)
- [List Caller Profiles](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/list-caller-profiles)
- [Create TN Account Asset](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/create-tn-asset)
- [Create TN Account Asset (BYOC)](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/create-tn-asset-byoc)
- [Update TN Account Asset](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/update-tn-asset)
- [Get TN Account Asset](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/get-tn-asset)
- [List TN Account Assets](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/list-tn-assets)
- [Delete TN Account Asset](https://tcs.mountainaiproject.com/products/bcd/api/delete-tn-asset)
